## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 11 seconds per flight higher in Germany. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Saarbrücken (EDDR) (117.8 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Leipzig (EDDP) (20.5 seconds per flight).
